free_text: only at 0-10 degr.
Isoscalar electric multipole strength in 12C
Multipole-dipole-multipole spectrometer
Self-supporting natural carbon foils of thicknesses 2,
4.02, and  8.6 mg/cm2 were used as a targets. The
first two targets were  made of layers of vacuum
evaporated carbon foils and the third  target was a
graphite foil.
Cross sections were obtained from the charge collected,
target thickness, dead time and known solid angle.
Cumulative uncertainties in target
thickness, solid angle, etc, result in about 10 %
uncertainty in absolute cross section
